body_excerpt: In hci_send_acl and related functions of hci_core.c, there is a possible way to corrupt memory due to a use after free. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with System execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: In hci_send_acl and related functions of hci_core.c, there is a possible way to corrupt memory due to a use after free. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with System execution privilege
